Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Class TermImpl

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.TermImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
SVSubstitute, Sorted, Term, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
public class TermImpl extends Object implements Term, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
The currently only class implementing the Term interface. TermFactory should be the only class dealing directly with the TermImpl class.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TermImpl(Operator op, ImmutableArray<Term> subs, ImmutableArray<QuantifiableVariable> boundVars, JavaBlock javaBlock)
    Constructs a term for the given operator, with the given sub terms, bounded variables and (if applicable) the code block on this term.

    Checks if o is a term syntactically equal to this one, except for some irrelevant labels.

    Checks whether this object and the other object represent the same data, whilst ignoring attributes that are not relevant for the purpose of these objects in the proof.

    Compares if two terms are equal modulo bound renaming
    boolean
    equalsModTermLabels(Object o)
    Checks if o is a term syntactically equal to this one, ignoring all term labels.
    void
    execPostOrder(Visitor visitor)
    The visitor is handed through till the bottom of the tree and then it walks upwards, while at each upstep the method visit of the visitor is called.
    void
    execPreOrder(Visitor visitor)
    The visitor walks downwards the tree, while at each downstep the method visit of the visitor is called.

    The set of free quantifiable variables occurring in this term.

    Returns the first TermLabel with the given Name.

    The top operator (e.g., in "A and B" this is "and", in f(x,y) it is "f").

  • Constructor Details

    • TermImpl

      public TermImpl(Operator op, ImmutableArray<Term> subs, ImmutableArray<QuantifiableVariable> boundVars, JavaBlock javaBlock)
      Constructs a term for the given operator, with the given sub terms, bounded variables and (if applicable) the code block on this term.
      Parameters:
      op - the operator of the term, e.g., some arithmetic operation
      subs - the sub terms of the constructed term (whose type is constrained by the used operator)
      boundVars - the bounded variables (if applicable), e.g., for quantifiers
      javaBlock - the code block (if applicable) after which the term is evaluated

  • Method Details

    • checked

      public Term checked()
      Checks whether the Term is valid on the top level. If this is the case this method returns the Term unmodified. Otherwise a TermCreationException is thrown.

    • op

      public Operator op()
      Description copied from interface: Term
      The top operator (e.g., in "A and B" this is "and", in f(x,y) it is "f").
      Specified by:
      op in interface Term

    • op

      public <T> T op(Class<T> opClass) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Description copied from interface: Term
      The top operator (e.g., in "A and B" this is "and", in f(x,y) it is "f") casted to the passed type.
      Specified by:
      op in interface Term
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException

    • execPostOrder

      public void execPostOrder(Visitor visitor)
      Description copied from interface: Term
      The visitor is handed through till the bottom of the tree and then it walks upwards, while at each upstep the method visit of the visitor is called.
      Specified by:
      execPostOrder in interface Term
      Parameters:
      visitor - the Visitor

      public void execPreOrder(Visitor visitor)
      Description copied from interface: Term
      The visitor walks downwards the tree, while at each downstep the method visit of the visitor is called.
      Specified by:
      execPreOrder in interface Term
      Parameters:
      visitor - the Visitor

    • equalsModRenaming

      public final boolean equalsModRenaming(Term o)
      Description copied from interface: Term
      Compares if two terms are equal modulo bound renaming
      Specified by:
      equalsModRenaming in interface Term
      Parameters:
      o - another term,
      Returns:
      true iff the given term has the same values in operator, sort, arity, varsBoundHere and javaBlock as this object modulo bound renaming

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      true iff o is syntactically equal to this term

    • equalsModIrrelevantTermLabels

      public boolean equalsModIrrelevantTermLabels(Object o)
      Description copied from interface: Term
      Checks if o is a term syntactically equal to this one, except for some irrelevant labels.
      Specified by:
      equalsModIrrelevantTermLabels in interface Term
      Parameters:
      o - an object
      Returns:
      true iff o is a term syntactically equal to this one, except for their labels.
      See Also:
      • isStrategyRelevant

    • equalsModTermLabels

      public boolean equalsModTermLabels(Object o)
      Description copied from interface: Term
      Checks if o is a term syntactically equal to this one, ignoring all term labels.
      Specified by:
      equalsModTermLabels in interface Term
      Parameters:
      o - an object
      Returns:
      true iff o is a term syntactically equal to this ignoring term labels

      Specified by:
      equalsModProofIrrelevancy in interface EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
      Parameters:
      o - other object
      Returns:
      whether these objects are equal

    • containsJavaBlockRecursive

      public boolean containsJavaBlockRecursive()
      Checks if the Term or one of its direct or indirect children contains a non empty JavaBlock.
      Specified by:
      containsJavaBlockRecursive in interface Term
      Returns:
      true The Term or one of its direct or indirect children contains a non empty JavaBlock, false no JavaBlock available.

    • getOrigin

      @Nullable public String getOrigin()
      Description copied from interface: Term
